summary: PFI root human-entry files were converted to Markdown filenames and minimal root governance evidence was added.
PFI V0.2 Stage 2 local contract acceptance completed for phases 2A-2H; production readiness remains out of scope.
PFI V0.2 Stage 3 readable MVP acceptance completed for homepage, account map, ledger view and low-operation UX; production readiness remains out of scope.

PFI V0.2 Stage 4 analysis MVP acceptance completed for investment summary, attribution, risk, behavior review, consumption summary, classification, recurring subscriptions, anomalies and cashflow forecast; production readiness remains out of scope.

PFI V0.2 Stage 5 advice, reports, and Alpha read-only export acceptance completed for recommendation model, review lifecycle, investment and consumption recommendations, Top N ranking, monthly/investment/consumption/data-quality reports, reproducible exports, and pfi_context_snapshot_v1; production readiness and Alpha repo modification remain out of scope.
